mapper.select:
SELECT si.* ,dst.security_type_name FROM rrs_securityinfo si LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = si.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0
AND si.security_type = 'crmw'
AND si.wind_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityCode}, '%')
AND si.short_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityShortName}, '%')
AND si.issuer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issuer}, '%')
ORDER BY si.id DESC

SELECT si.* ,dst.security_type_name FROM rrs_securityinfo si LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = si.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0
AND (si.security_type IS NULL OR si.security_type != 'crmw')
AND si.wind_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityCode}, '%')
AND si.short_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityShortName}, '%')
AND si.issuer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issuer}, '%')
ORDER BY si.id DESC
SELECT si.* ,dst.security_type_name FROM rrs_securityinfo si LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = si.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 WHERE si.wind_code = #{securityCode}

SELECT ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type ,ips.adjust_batch_no ,ips.adjust_log_id ,DATE_FORMAT(ips.entry_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate FROM ip_pool_status_crmw ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND p.pool_type = 'crmw' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.is_deleted = 0 )

SELECT ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type ,MAX(ips.adjust_batch_no) AS adjustBatchNo ,DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ips.entry_time), '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate ,COUNT(DISTINCT ips.security_code) AS bondCount FROM ip_pool_status_crmw ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo sb ON ips.security_code = sb.wind_code INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE sb.issuer = ( SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND p.pool_type = 'crmw' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.is_deleted = 0 ) GROUP BY p.id ,ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type

SELECT al.id ,al.security_code ,al.security_short_name ,al.security_type ,al.adjust_type ,al.adjust_mode ,al.adjust_batch_no ,al.target_pool_id ,al.target_pool_name ,al.pool_type ,al.flow_id ,al.flow_key ,al.flow_type ,fd.name AS flowName ,al.audit_status ,al.adjuster_id ,al.adjuster_name ,al.adjust_reason ,al.adjust_advice ,al.submit_time ,al.audit_time ,al.entry_time FROM ip_adjust_log al LEFT JOIN wf_flow_definition fd ON fd.id = al.flow_id WHERE al.security_code = #{securityCode} AND al.is_deleted = 0 AND al.pool_type = 'crmw'
AND al.adjust_batch_no = #{adjustBatchNo}
AND (al.audit_status IS NULL OR al.audit_status NOT IN ('-1', '20', '21', '99'))
ORDER BY al.crte_time DESC
SELECT DISTINCT target_pool_id FROM ip_pool_status_crmw WHERE security_code = #{securityCode} AND audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0 AND pool_type = 'crmw'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT security_code) FROM ip_pool_status_crmw WHERE target_pool_id = #{poolId} AND audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT target_pool_id AS id ,COUNT(DISTINCT security_code) AS currentCount FROM ip_pool_status_crmw WHERE audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY target_pool_id

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step s ON s.adjust_batch_no = al.adjust_batch_no WHERE al.security_code = #{securityCode} AND al.pool_type = 'crmw' AND al.is_deleted = 0 AND s.step_status = 'pending'

SELECT s.node_label FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step s ON s.adjust_batch_no = al.adjust_batch_no WHERE al.security_code = #{securityCode} AND al.pool_type = 'crmw' AND al.is_deleted = 0 AND s.step_status = 'pending' ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC ,s.id ASC ,al.submit_time DESC ,al.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND p.pool_type = 'observe' AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo si ON si.wind_code = ips.security_code INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE si.issuer = ( SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND p.pool_type = 'observe' AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0

SELECT MAX(DATEDIFF(STR_TO_DATE(si.date_next, '%Y%m%d'), CURDATE())) FROM ip_pool_status_crmw ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo si ON si.wind_code = ips.security_code WHERE si.issuer = ( SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND ips.target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND si.date_next REGEXP '^[0-9]{8}$'

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status_crmw ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo si ON si.wind_code = ips.security_code WHERE si.issuer = ( SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND ips.target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND ips.flow_type = 'simpleInbound' AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND ips.entry_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
mapper.update: UPDATE ip_pool_status_crmw SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE security_code = #{securityCode} AND target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND audit_status = '20' AND pool_type = 'crmw' AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id ,adjust_log_id ,adjust_batch_no ,flow_node_id ,node_code ,node_label ,node_type ,approval_strategy ,sort_order ,step_status ,handler_id ,handler_name ,process_action ,process_comment ,start_time ,process_time FROM ip_adjust_step WHERE adjust_log_id = #{adjustLogId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id ,adjust_log_id ,adjust_batch_no ,flow_node_id ,node_code ,node_label ,node_type ,approval_strategy ,sort_order ,step_status ,handler_id ,handler_name ,process_action ,process_comment ,start_time ,process_time FROM ip_adjust_step WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id FROM ip_pool_relation WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT category_type FROM dict_security_type WHERE security_type = #{securityType} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
